30

1.20 3.20

(o 12) Month 2 1 30 Addaru (XII) Barley 1 20 3 20

o 1313

lu₂TUR u₄-mu ša ŠA₃ AMA-⸢šu₂⸣ x [x] TAR E₃!⸢ṣi⸣

(o 13) The baby - to know the days that it is inside its mother ... [...] ... emerges.

o 1414

ZUu₂ 10 ZI 10 A.RA₂ ⸢30⸣ [...] x DU-ma

(o 14) You subtract 10. You multiply 10 times 30 [...] ... and (you get) 5 00. 5, 10 (and) 5 : 3 fingers.

o 1515

5 5 10 5 : 3 ŠU.SI 5!(4v) A.RA₂ 10 [x] x ITI

(o 15) You multiply 5 times 10 [...] ... the month and (you get) 50, 50, 1 hundred (and) 50 grains: 30 fingers.

o 1616

DU-ma 50 50 1 ME 50 ŠE.BAR-MEŠ! 30 ŠU.SI [...]

(o 16) [...] is greater than 50 by 40.

o 1717

UGU 50 40!(IM) DIRItar

Reverse
r 1r 1

KUŠ UDU.NITA₂ BABBARu : KUŠ GU₄ GE₆ : KUŠ ANŠE.⸢GIR₃⸣.[NUN.NA]

(r 1) A white ram's skin : a black bull's hide : a mule's hide (:) a red horse's hide. This is said for a poultice.

r 22

KUŠ ANŠE.KUR.RA SA₅ an-nu-u₂ ana me-eli DU₁₁.GA

r 33

KI mul₂LU₂ UŠ₂ IM.RI.A : KI MUL₂.MUL₂ UŠ₂ ta-ḫa-zu

(r 3) (If the baby) dies in the sign of the Hireling: family. : (If) he dies in the sign of the Bristle: battle.

r 44

KI mul₂SIPA u MAŠ.MAŠ UŠ₂ ki-li : <KI> mul₂ALLA UŠ₂ a-ab-bu

(r 4) (If) he dies in the sign of the Shepherd or the Twins: confinement. : (If) he dies in the sign of the Crab: enemy.

r 55

KI mul₂UR SIG UŠ₂ BAR NIG₂.TUK ša₂-niš KUR EN DU₁₁-šu₂

(r 5) (If) he weakens (and) dies in the sign of the Lion: division of riches; alternatively, his adversary's success.

r 66

KI mul₂AB.SIN₂ ša₂ SIG ni-ziq-tu₄

(r 6) (If) in the sign of the Furrow: worry for the weak one.

r 77

KI mul₂ZI U₄ IM? MU GIR₃ BA UŠ₂ : KI mul₂GIR₂ UŠ₂ U₄-MEŠ ni-⸢ziq⸣-[tu₄]

(r 7) (If) in the sign of the Scales: ... will die. : (If) he dies in the sign of the Scorpion: days of grief.

r 88

KI mul₂PA U₄-MEŠ DU₁₀-ME BE ABZU

(r 8) (If) in the sign of Pabilsag: good days, ... Apsu.

r 99

KI mul₂MAŠ₂ UKU₂in ra-pa-du DU MAŠ MAŠ UŠ₂ AB BA GIG? BA AŠ ZA₃

(r 9) (If) in the sign of the Goatfish: he will become poor, he will catch rapādu-disease (and) he will die. ... [...].

r 1010

KI mul₂GU MU DU₁₀.GA TUKU DUMU-MEŠ TUKU-MEŠ BE x [...]

(r 10) (If) in the sign of the Great One: he will have a good year. They will acquire sons. ... [...].

r 1111

KI mul₂KUN MU DU₁₀.GA U₄-MEŠ SU₃-MEŠ ⸢GI?⸣ [...]

(r 11) (If) in the sign of the Tails: a good year, distant days ... [...].

(colophon)
r 1212

imGID₂.DA mBAša₂-a bu-kur₂ mdINANA—⸢MU⸣—[KAM]

(r 12) Oblong tablet of Iqiša, son of Ištar-šum-ereš, descendant of Ekur-zakir, incantation priest [...].

r 1313

ŠA₃.BAL.BAL mE₂.KUR—za-⸢kir⸣ lu₂⸢MAŠ⸣.[MAŠ ...]

r 1414

U₂ ina SAḪAR SA₅ x [...]

(r 14) Plants in red earth ... [...] ... [...]

r 1515

x x x [...]

r 1616

NUMUN GADA ⸢ŠIR⸣ [...]

(r 16) Flax seeds, a testicle [...], animal fat of ... [...].

r 1717

I₃.UDU-MEŠ ša₂ x [...]
